name: jean-scroll-world
description: Immersive scroll-scrubbed 'fly through the world' landing pages, generated through Kie.ai by default. Hardened fork of oso95/scroll-world with Kie Seedance/Seedream support, budget tiers, spend gates, SSIM seam verification, mobile tiers, and SEO.

plugins.name: scroll-world-kie
plugins.description: Build an immersive scroll-scrubbed landing page where a pre-rendered camera flies through connected scenes with no cuts. Uses Kie.ai by default for Seedream anchor art and strict first/last-frame Seedance clips, verifies seams with SSIM, and wires a portable scrub engine.
